Arrowhead 20px
Frozen
System: right-click the board to add words (,, = several · _ = phrase group · // = 2-line node · + = co-located group · -- = linked chain) · Move: drag words and drop onto another word to group · Multi-select: Ctrl/Cmd+click, then right-click selection to align, distribute, or grid · Shortcuts: Ctrl/Cmd+G group, Ctrl/Cmd+A select all, Ctrl/Cmd+H hide/reveal, Delete/Backspace remove selection, Ctrl/Cmd+↑/↓ increase/decrease font size, Esc close menus, Ctrl/Cmd+Z undo, Ctrl/Cmd+Y or Ctrl/Cmd+Shift+Z redo, Ctrl/Cmd+S save

🎨 Customise Board
🌐 Node Colour Swatches
Palette used when applying colours to nodes. Each entry: background / text colour / border colour.
Name Preview Bg Txt Bdr
🔲 Node Border Colour Swatches
Quick-pick border colours shown in the node context menu (Br row).
📝 Note Background Swatches
Background colours available in the note style panel. Accepts any CSS colour value (hex, rgba, named).
🖊 Note Text Colour Swatches
Colour dots shown in the note context menu for changing selected-text colour.
🖍 Note Highlight Swatches
Highlight colours for selected text inside notes. Use transparent to remove highlight.
🔲 Note Border Colour Swatches
Quick-pick border colours shown in the note style panel (Border row).
📐 Default Sizes
px
px
px
🔤 Default Fonts
Font family applied to new nodes and notes. Choose "Default (inherit)" to use the page font.
The quick brown fox
The quick brown fox
⬜ Default Node Border
px
🔗 Default Link Stroke
px
✏️ Drawing Pen Defaults
4px
⬤ Laser Pointer Colour
🧩 Media Insert Sizes
Initial width when inserting attachments onto the board. Set PDF to 0 for automatic (80% of board width).
px (0 = auto)
px
px
px
🖼 Board Background
Default background colour for new/empty board pages. You can still change it quickly from board right-click.
Quick presets shown in constellation board right-click menu.
📄 Board Layout
Default constellation board frame. Choose A4 landscape/portrait or define a custom size and orientation.
px
px
🎨 Node Preset Styles
Define up to 15 quick-apply style presets for constellation nodes (saved in board-config.js).
🗒 Note Preset Styles
Define up to 15 quick-apply style presets for constellation notes (saved in board-config.js).
✏️ Drawing Pen Presets
Quick-apply pen presets shown in the draw toolbar. Each preset configures colour, opacity, thickness, and shape tool.
🎨 Node Preset Styles
Define up to 15 quick-apply styles for constellation nodes. Changes are saved to board-config.js.
🗒 Note Preset Styles
Define quick-apply styles for constellation notes. Saved to board-config.js under notePresets.
